title: Director
doc_html:
§44.  Director

Section 44.  The commission shall appoint a director and such personnel as shall be necessary to carry out its duties.

Added by Acts 1990, No. 1106, §1, approved Oct. 6, 1990, eff. Jan. 1, 1991.
doc_text:
§44.  Director
Section 44.  The commission shall appoint a director and such personnel as shall be necessary to carry out its duties.
Added by Acts 1990, No. 1106, §1, approved Oct. 6, 1990, eff. Jan. 1, 1991.
